---
title: "Explorateur de Prédictions COICOP"
subtitle: "Analyse interactive des résultats du classifieur — BDF INSEE"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    scrolling: true
    nav-buttons: []
lang: fr
---

```{ojs}
//| output: false

/* ================================================================
   GLOBAL DEFINITIONS — available to ALL pages
   ================================================================ */

db = DuckDBClient.of({})

PALETTE = ({
  levels: ["#4361ee", "#2ec4b6", "#f77f00", "#d62828"],
  severity: {
    "correct":    "#2ec4b6",
    "near-miss":  "#8bc34a",
    "L3 faux":    "#f77f00",
    "L2 faux":    "#ff6b35",
    "far-miss":   "#d62828"
  },
  neutral: "#8d99ae"
})

fmt_n   = d3.format(",")
fmt_pct = d3.format(".1f")
fmt_conf = d3.format(".3f")
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

/* Custom CSS injected once */
html`<style>
  /* General dashboard readability */
  .dashboard-page { font-family: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif; }

  /* Metric cards */
  .metric-card {
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 1rem 0.75rem;
    text-align: center;
    color: white;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.10);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .metric-card .value {
    font-size: 1.7em;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.15;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  }
  .metric-card .label {
    font-size: 0.78em;
    opacity: 0.92;
    margin-top: 0.2rem;
  }

  /* Tables */
  .dash-table {
    font-size: 0.85em;
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0;
  }
  .dash-table thead th {
    background: #f1f3f5;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.8em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: #495057;
    padding: 0.55rem 0.6rem;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #dee2e6;
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .dash-table tbody td {
    padding: 0.45rem 0.6rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f3f5;
    vertical-align: middle;
  }
  .dash-table tbody tr:hover {
    background: #e8f4fd !important;
  }

  /* Section titles inside cards */
  .section-title {
    font-size: 0.82em;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: #6c757d;
    margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #e9ecef;
  }

  /* Progress bars */
  .acc-bar-bg {
    background: #e9ecef;
    border-radius: 6px;
    height: 10px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .acc-bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 6px; transition: width 0.3s; }

  /* Sidebar tweaks */
  .sidebar h5, .sidebar h6 { font-size: 0.85em !important; }
  .sidebar hr { margin: 0.6rem 0; border-color: #e9ecef; }

  /* Filter pills */
  .filter-stat {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.3rem;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 0.8em;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* Error explorer table row colors */
  .sev-correct   { background: #d8f3dc !important; }
  .sev-nearmiss  { background: #e8f5e9 !important; }
  .sev-l3faux    { background: #fff8e1 !important; }
  .sev-l2faux    { background: #fff3e0 !important; }
  .sev-farmiss   { background: #fce4ec !important; }

  /* Code badges */
  .code-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-family: monospace;
    font-size: 0.82em;
    padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: #f1f3f5;
    color: #212529;
  }
</style>`
```


# {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
html`<h5 style="margin:0 0 .4rem; color:#4361ee; font-weight:700">Fichier de predictions</h5>`

viewof predictions_url = Inputs.text({
  label: "URL HTTPS ou S3 (parquet)",
  placeholder: "https://…/predictions.parquet",
  value: ""
})

viewof load_btn = Inputs.button("Charger les donnees", {
  value: 0,
  reduce: (v) => v + 1
})
```

```{ojs}
{
  load_btn;
  if (!predictions_url?.trim())
    return html`<span style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; font-size:.82em">En attente d'une URL</span>`
  if (data_ready?.status === "loading")
    return html`<span style="color:#f77f00; font-size:.82em">Chargement…</span>`
  if (data_ready?.status === "error")
    return html`<span style="color:#d62828; font-size:.82em">Erreur : ${data_ready.message?.slice(0,80)}</span>`
  if (data_ready?.status === "ok")
    return html`<span style="color:#2ec4b6; font-size:.82em">${fmt_n(data_ready.n)} observations chargees</span>`
  return html`<span style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; font-size:.82em">Inactif</span>`
}
```

```{ojs}
html`<hr>`
html`<h6 style="color:#495057; font-weight:700">Filtres globaux</h6>`

viewof global_exclude_tech = Inputs.toggle({
  label: "Exclure codes 98/99",
  value: true
})

viewof global_source = Inputs.select(
  available_sources,
  { label: "Source", value: "Toutes" }
)

viewof global_year = Inputs.select(
  available_years,
  { label: "Annee", value: "Toutes" }
)

viewof global_conf_min = Inputs.range([0, 1], {
  label: "Confiance min.",
  step: 0.05,
  value: 0
})
```


# Vue d'ensemble

```{ojs}
//| output: false

/* ================================================================
   DATA LOADING
   ================================================================ */

data_ready = {
  load_btn;
  if (!predictions_url?.trim()) return { status: "empty" };

  const url = predictions_url.trim();

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(url);
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${resp.status} — ${resp.statusText}`);
    const buf = new Uint8Array(await resp.arrayBuffer());

    await db._db.registerFileBuffer("predictions.parquet", buf);

    await db.query(`
      CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW preds AS
      WITH base AS (
        SELECT * FROM read_parquet('predictions.parquet')
      ),
      leveled AS (
        SELECT *,
          lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
            AS true_level1,
          CASE WHEN len(string_split(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.')) >= 2
            THEN lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 2)
            ELSE NULL END AS true_level2,
          CASE WHEN len(string_split(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.')) >= 3
            THEN lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 2)
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 3)
            ELSE NULL END AS true_level3,
          CASE WHEN len(string_split(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.')) >= 4
            THEN lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 2)
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 3)
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 4)
            ELSE NULL END AS true_level4,
          lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
            IN ('98', '99') AS is_technical,
          len(string_split(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.')) AS code_depth,
          TRY_CAST(confidence AS DOUBLE) AS confidence_num,
          TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) AS budget_num,
          TRY_CAST(annee AS INTEGER) AS annee_int,
          len(COALESCE(l_pr_product, '')) AS text_len
        FROM base
      ),
      with_errors AS (
        SELECT *,
          (true_level1 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level1 IS NOT NULL
           AND true_level1 <> predicted_level1) AS err_l1,
          (true_level2 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level2 IS NOT NULL
           AND true_level2 <> predicted_level2) AS err_l2,
          (true_level3 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level3 IS NOT NULL
           AND true_level3 <> predicted_level3) AS err_l3,
          (true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
           AND true_level4 <> predicted_level4) AS err_l4,
          CASE
            WHEN true_level4 IS NULL OR predicted_level4 IS NULL THEN NULL
            WHEN true_level1 IS NOT NULL
             AND true_level1 <> predicted_level1 THEN 'far-miss'
            WHEN true_level2 IS NOT NULL
             AND true_level2 <> predicted_level2 THEN 'L2 faux'
            WHEN true_level3 IS NOT NULL
             AND true_level3 <> predicted_level3 THEN 'L3 faux'
            WHEN true_level4 <> predicted_level4 THEN 'near-miss'
            ELSE 'correct'
          END AS error_severity,
          CASE
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 0 AND 2    THEN '0-2 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 2 AND 5    THEN '2-5 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 5 AND 10   THEN '5-10 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 10 AND 20  THEN '10-20 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 20 AND 50  THEN '20-50 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 50 AND 100 THEN '50-100 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) > 100              THEN '100+ €'
            ELSE NULL
          END AS budget_tranche
        FROM leveled
      )
      SELECT * FROM with_errors
    `);

    const cols = await db.query(`
      SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns
      WHERE table_name = 'preds'
        AND column_name LIKE 'predicted_level4_top%'
      ORDER BY column_name
    `);
    const topk_available = cols.map(c => c.column_name);

    const test = await db.query("SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM preds");
    return { status: "ok", n: Number(test[0].n), topk_cols: topk_available };
  } catch(e) {
    return { status: "error", message: e.message };
  }
}

available_sources = {
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return ["Toutes"];
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT DISTINCT source FROM preds WHERE source IS NOT NULL ORDER BY source
  `);
  return ["Toutes", ...rows.map(r => r.source)];
}

available_years = {
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return ["Toutes"];
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT DISTINCT annee_int FROM preds WHERE annee_int IS NOT NULL ORDER BY annee_int
  `);
  return ["Toutes", ...rows.map(r => String(r.annee_int))];
}

available_shop_types = {
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return ["Tous"];
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT DISTINCT shop_type_name FROM preds
    WHERE shop_type_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY shop_type_name
  `);
  return ["Tous", ...rows.map(r => r.shop_type_name)];
}

global_where = {
  const parts = ["1=1"];
  if (global_exclude_tech) parts.push("NOT is_technical");
  if (global_source !== "Toutes") parts.push(`source = '${global_source.replace(/'/g,"''")}'`);
  if (global_year !== "Toutes") parts.push(`annee_int = ${global_year}`);
  if (global_conf_min > 0) parts.push(`confidence_num >= ${global_conf_min}`);
  return parts.join(" AND ");
}
```

## Row {height="130px"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") {
    return html`<div style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; padding:1.5rem; text-align:center">
      Chargez un fichier parquet pour afficher les metriques.
    </div>`
  }

  const stats = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n_total,
      CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN is_technical THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS n_tech,
      AVG(CASE WHEN NOT is_technical AND true_level1 IS NOT NULL
               AND predicted_level1 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level1 = predicted_level1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l1,
      AVG(CASE WHEN NOT is_technical AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL
               AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level4 = predicted_level4 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l4,
      AVG(CASE WHEN NOT is_technical THEN confidence_num END) AS mean_conf
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${global_where}
  `);
  const s = stats[0];

  const card = (val, lbl, bg) => html`
    <div class="metric-card" style="background:${bg}">
      <div class="value">${val}</div>
      <div class="label">${lbl}</div>
    </div>`;

  return html`<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr); gap:.6rem; height:100%">
    ${card(fmt_n(s.n_total), "Observations", "#4361ee")}
    ${card(fmt_pct(s.n_tech / s.n_total * 100) + "%", "Codes techniques 98/99", "#8d99ae")}
    ${card(fmt_pct(s.acc_l1) + "%", "Accuracy Niveau 1", s.acc_l1 >= 90 ? "#2ec4b6" : s.acc_l1 >= 70 ? "#f77f00" : "#d62828")}
    ${card(fmt_pct(s.acc_l4) + "%", "Accuracy Niveau 4", s.acc_l4 >= 80 ? "#2ec4b6" : s.acc_l4 >= 60 ? "#f77f00" : "#d62828")}
    ${card(fmt_conf(s.mean_conf ?? 0), "Confiance moyenne", "#6c63ff")}
  </div>`;
}
```

## Row

### Accuracy par niveau {width="45%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">…</p>`

  const rows = [];
  for (const lvl of [1,2,3,4]) {
    const r = await db.query(`
      SELECT
        ${lvl} AS niveau,
        CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n,
        AVG(CASE WHEN true_level${lvl} = predicted_level${lvl} THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS accuracy,
        CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT true_level${lvl}) AS INTEGER) AS n_classes
      FROM preds
      WHERE ${global_where}
        AND true_level${lvl} IS NOT NULL
        AND predicted_level${lvl} IS NOT NULL
    `);
    if (r.length) rows.push(r[0]);
  }

  const levelColors = ["#4361ee", "#2ec4b6", "#f77f00", "#d62828"];

  return html`
    <div class="section-title">Performance par niveau hierarchique</div>
    <table class="dash-table">
      <thead><tr>
        <th>Niveau</th>
        <th style="text-align:right">Observations</th>
        <th style="text-align:right">Classes</th>
        <th style="text-align:right">Accuracy</th>
        <th style="width:140px"></th>
      </tr></thead>
      <tbody>
      ${rows.map((r, i) => {
        const acc = Number(r.accuracy ?? 0);
        const color = levelColors[i] || "#4361ee";
        return html`<tr>
          <td><span style="display:inline-block; width:10px; height:10px; border-radius:50%; background:${color}; margin-right:.4rem"></span><strong>Niveau ${r.niveau}</strong></td>
          <td style="text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums">${fmt_n(r.n)}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums">${r.n_classes}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right"><strong style="font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums">${fmt_pct(acc)}%</strong></td>
          <td>
            <div class="acc-bar-bg">
              <div class="acc-bar-fill" style="width:${acc}%; background:${color}"></div>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>`;
      })}
      </tbody>
    </table>`;
}
```

### Top-k accuracy (niveau 4) {width="55%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">…</p>`

  const topk_cols = data_ready?.topk_cols ?? [];
  const topk_data = [];

  for (let k = 1; k <= 10; k++) {
    const candidates = ["predicted_level4"];
    for (let r = 2; r <= k; r++) {
      const col = `predicted_level4_top${r}`;
      if (topk_cols.includes(col)) candidates.push(col);
    }
    const in_clause = candidates.map(c => `CAST(${c} AS VARCHAR)`).join(", ");
    const res = await db.query(`
      SELECT ${k} AS k,
        AVG(CASE WHEN CAST(true_level4 AS VARCHAR) IN (${in_clause}) THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS accuracy
      FROM preds
      WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
    `);
    topk_data.push({ k, accuracy: Number(res[0]?.accuracy ?? 0), available: candidates.length });
  }

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 260,
    marginLeft: 55,
    marginBottom: 40,
    style: { fontSize: "12px" },
    x: { label: "k (top-k)", tickFormat: d => `${d}` },
    y: { label: "Accuracy (%)", domain: [0, 100], grid: true },
    marks: [
      Plot.ruleY([0]),
      Plot.areaY(topk_data, {
        x: "k", y: "accuracy",
        fill: "#4361ee", fillOpacity: 0.08
      }),
      Plot.line(topk_data, {
        x: "k", y: "accuracy",
        stroke: "#4361ee", strokeWidth: 2.5
      }),
      Plot.dot(topk_data, {
        x: "k", y: "accuracy",
        fill: d => d.available > 1 ? "#4361ee" : "#adb5bd",
        r: 5, stroke: "white", strokeWidth: 1.5,
        tip: true,
        title: d => `Top-${d.k} : ${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}%`
      }),
      Plot.text(topk_data.filter(d => [1,3,5,10].includes(d.k)), {
        x: "k", y: "accuracy",
        text: d => `${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}%`,
        dy: -14, fontSize: 11, fill: "#4361ee", fontWeight: "600"
      })
    ]
  });
}
```

## Row

### Distribution des scores de confiance {width="50%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">…</p>`

  const bins = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      ROUND(confidence_num * 20) / 20 AS conf_bin,
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level4 = predicted_level4 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS acc
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${global_where} AND confidence_num IS NOT NULL AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
  `);

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 240,
    marginLeft: 55,
    marginBottom: 40,
    style: { fontSize: "12px" },
    x: { label: "Score de confiance", domain: [0, 1] },
    y: { label: "Nombre d'observations", grid: true },
    marks: [
      Plot.rectY(bins, {
        x1: d => d.conf_bin - 0.025,
        x2: d => d.conf_bin + 0.025,
        y: "n",
        fill: d => d.acc >= 0.9 ? "#2ec4b6" : d.acc >= 0.7 ? "#f77f00" : "#d62828",
        rx: 2,
        tip: true,
        title: d => `Confiance ~ ${fmt_pct(d.conf_bin * 100)}%\nN = ${fmt_n(d.n)}\nAccuracy = ${fmt_pct(d.acc * 100)}%`
      })
    ]
  });
}
```

### Couverture vs Accuracy par seuil {width="50%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">…</p>`

  const tdata = await db.query(`
    WITH base AS (
      SELECT confidence_num AS c,
             (true_level4 = predicted_level4)::INT AS correct
      FROM preds
      WHERE ${global_where}
        AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
    ),
    thresholds AS (
      SELECT unnest(generate_series(0, 20)) / 20.0 AS seuil
    )
    SELECT
      t.seuil,
      AVG(CASE WHEN b.c >= t.seuil THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS couverture,
      COALESCE(
        AVG(CASE WHEN b.c >= t.seuil THEN b.correct::DOUBLE ELSE NULL END),
        0
      ) AS accuracy
    FROM base b CROSS JOIN thresholds t
    GROUP BY t.seuil
    ORDER BY t.seuil
  `);

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 240,
    marginLeft: 55,
    marginBottom: 40,
    style: { fontSize: "12px" },
    x: { label: "Seuil de confiance", domain: [0, 1] },
    y: { label: "(%)", domain: [0, 100], grid: true },
    color: {
      legend: true,
      domain: ["Couverture", "Accuracy"],
      range: ["#ff6b35", "#4361ee"]
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.areaY(tdata, {
        x: "seuil", y: d => d.couverture * 100,
        fill: "#ff6b35", fillOpacity: 0.06
      }),
      Plot.areaY(tdata, {
        x: "seuil", y: d => d.accuracy * 100,
        fill: "#4361ee", fillOpacity: 0.06
      }),
      Plot.line(tdata, { x: "seuil", y: d => d.couverture * 100, stroke: "#ff6b35", strokeWidth: 2.5 }),
      Plot.line(tdata, { x: "seuil", y: d => d.accuracy * 100, stroke: "#4361ee", strokeWidth: 2.5 }),
      Plot.tip(tdata, Plot.pointerX({
        x: "seuil",
        title: d => `Seuil : ${fmt_pct(d.seuil * 100)}%\nCouverture : ${fmt_pct(d.couverture * 100)}%\nAccuracy : ${fmt_pct(d.accuracy * 100)}%`
      }))
    ]
  });
}
```


# Analyse par Criteres

## Row {height="50px"}

```{ojs}
viewof analysis_dim = Inputs.select(
  ["source", "annee", "shop_type_name", "budget_tranche"],
  {
    label: "Dimension d'analyse",
    format: d => ({
      source: "Source de donnees",
      annee: "Annee",
      shop_type_name: "Type de magasin",
      budget_tranche: "Tranche de budget"
    })[d]
  }
)
```

## Row

### Accuracy par dimension et niveau {width="60%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">Chargez un fichier.</p>`

  const dim = analysis_dim;
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS dim_val,
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n_total,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level1 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level1 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level1 = predicted_level1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l1,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level2 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level2 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level2 = predicted_level2 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l2,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level3 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level3 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level3 = predicted_level3 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l3,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level4 = predicted_level4 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l4
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${global_where}
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY n_total DESC
    LIMIT 20
  `);

  const plot_data = rows.flatMap(r => [1,2,3,4].map(lvl => ({
    dim_val: r.dim_val.length > 25 ? r.dim_val.slice(0,23) + "…" : r.dim_val,
    niveau: `N${lvl}`,
    accuracy: Number(r[`acc_l${lvl}`] ?? 0)
  })));

  return Plot.plot({
    height: Math.max(300, rows.length * 32 + 60),
    marginLeft: Math.min(200, Math.max(...rows.map(r => r.dim_val.length)) * 7 + 10),
    marginRight: 60,
    style: { fontSize: "12px" },
    x: { label: "Accuracy (%)", domain: [0, 100], grid: true },
    color: {
      legend: true,
      domain: ["N1","N2","N3","N4"],
      range: ["#4361ee", "#2ec4b6", "#f77f00", "#d62828"]
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(plot_data, {
        y: "dim_val",
        x: "accuracy",
        fill: "niveau",
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.dim_val} — ${d.niveau}\n${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}%`
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });
}
```

### Volume et confiance {width="40%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">…</p>`

  const dim = analysis_dim;
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS dim_val,
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n,
      AVG(confidence_num) AS mean_conf
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${global_where}
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY n DESC
    LIMIT 20
  `);

  const ml = Math.min(180, Math.max(...rows.map(r => r.dim_val.length)) * 7 + 10);

  const vol_chart = Plot.plot({
    height: 220,
    marginLeft: ml,
    marginBottom: 35,
    style: { fontSize: "11px" },
    x: { label: "Observations", grid: true },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(rows, {
        y: d => d.dim_val.length > 22 ? d.dim_val.slice(0,20) + "…" : d.dim_val,
        x: "n",
        fill: "#4361ee",
        fillOpacity: 0.8,
        rx: 3,
        sort: { y: "-x" },
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.dim_val}\nN = ${fmt_n(d.n)}`
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });

  const conf_chart = Plot.plot({
    height: 220,
    marginLeft: ml,
    marginBottom: 35,
    style: { fontSize: "11px" },
    x: { label: "Confiance moyenne", domain: [0, 1], grid: true },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(rows, {
        y: d => d.dim_val.length > 22 ? d.dim_val.slice(0,20) + "…" : d.dim_val,
        x: "mean_conf",
        fill: "#2ec4b6",
        fillOpacity: 0.8,
        rx: 3,
        sort: { y: "-x" },
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.dim_val}\nConfiance = ${fmt_conf(d.mean_conf)}`
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });

  return html`
    <div class="section-title">Volume par dimension</div>
    ${vol_chart}
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:1rem">Confiance par dimension</div>
    ${conf_chart}`;
}
```

## Row {.tabset}

### Heatmap accuracy x Niveau

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">…</p>`

  const dim = analysis_dim;
  const heat_data = await db.query(`
    WITH top_vals AS (
      SELECT COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS dim_val, CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n
      FROM preds WHERE ${global_where}
      GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 15
    )
    SELECT
      COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS dim_val,
      1 AS niveau,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level1 = predicted_level1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS accuracy,
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n
    FROM preds JOIN top_vals ON COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') = top_vals.dim_val
    WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level1 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A'), 2,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level2 = predicted_level2 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100,
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER)
    FROM preds JOIN top_vals ON COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') = top_vals.dim_val
    WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level2 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A'), 3,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level3 = predicted_level3 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100,
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER)
    FROM preds JOIN top_vals ON COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') = top_vals.dim_val
    WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level3 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A'), 4,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level4 = predicted_level4 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100,
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER)
    FROM preds JOIN top_vals ON COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') = top_vals.dim_val
    WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ORDER BY 1, 2
  `);

  return Plot.plot({
    height: Math.max(280, heat_data.filter(d => d.niveau === 1).length * 32 + 60),
    marginLeft: 180,
    marginRight: 40,
    style: { fontSize: "12px" },
    color: {
      type: "linear", domain: [0, 100],
      range: ["#d62828", "#f77f00", "#2ec4b6"],
      legend: true, label: "Accuracy (%)"
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.cell(heat_data, {
        x: d => `Niveau ${d.niveau}`,
        y: d => d.dim_val.length > 25 ? d.dim_val.slice(0,23) + "…" : d.dim_val,
        fill: "accuracy",
        rx: 4,
        inset: 1.5,
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.dim_val} — Niveau ${d.niveau}\nAccuracy : ${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}%\nN = ${fmt_n(d.n)}`
      }),
      Plot.text(heat_data, {
        x: d => `Niveau ${d.niveau}`,
        y: d => d.dim_val.length > 25 ? d.dim_val.slice(0,23) + "…" : d.dim_val,
        text: d => `${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}`,
        fill: d => d.accuracy > 55 ? "white" : "#212529",
        fontSize: 11, fontWeight: "600"
      })
    ]
  });
}
```


# Explorateur d'Erreurs

## Row {height="100px"}

```{ojs}
html`<div class="row g-2">`

viewof err_search_text = Inputs.text({
  label: "Libelle produit",
  placeholder: "ex: jambon, yaourt…",
  value: ""
})

viewof err_true_code = Inputs.text({
  label: "Code vrai (prefixe)",
  placeholder: "ex: 01, 01.1",
  value: ""
})

viewof err_pred_code = Inputs.text({
  label: "Code predit (prefixe)",
  placeholder: "ex: 02, 03.1",
  value: ""
})

viewof err_source = Inputs.select(
  available_sources,
  { label: "Source", value: "Toutes" }
)

viewof err_year = Inputs.select(
  available_years,
  { label: "Annee", value: "Toutes" }
)

viewof err_shop_type = Inputs.select(
  available_shop_types,
  { label: "Type magasin", value: "Tous" }
)

viewof err_conf_min = Inputs.range([0, 1], {
  label: "Confiance min",
  step: 0.05,
  value: 0
})

viewof err_conf_max = Inputs.range([0, 1], {
  label: "Confiance max",
  step: 0.05,
  value: 1
})

viewof err_severity = Inputs.select(
  ["Tout", "Erreurs seulement", "Correct seulement", "near-miss", "L2 faux", "L3 faux", "far-miss"],
  { label: "Type d'erreur" }
)

html`</div>`
```

## Row {height="90px"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">…</p>`

  const { where_clause } = error_filter_state;

  const stats = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n_total,
      CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN err_l4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS n_errors,
      AVG(confidence_num) AS mean_conf,
      CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT true_level4) AS INTEGER) AS n_codes
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${where_clause} AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
  `);
  const s = stats[0];
  const err_rate = s.n_total > 0 ? s.n_errors / s.n_total : 0;

  const pill = (val, lbl, bg, fg) => html`
    <div style="
      background:${bg}; color:${fg}; border-radius:10px;
      padding:.6rem 1rem; text-align:center; flex:1;
      box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06)
    ">
      <div style="font-size:1.4em; font-weight:800; line-height:1.1">${val}</div>
      <div style="font-size:.72em; opacity:.85; margin-top:.15rem">${lbl}</div>
    </div>`;

  return html`<div style="display:flex; gap:.5rem; height:100%">
    ${pill(fmt_n(s.n_total), "Resultats filtres", "#eef0ff", "#4361ee")}
    ${pill(fmt_n(s.n_errors), "Erreurs N4", "#fce4ec", "#d62828")}
    ${pill(fmt_pct(err_rate * 100) + "%", "Taux d'erreur L4",
           err_rate < 0.1 ? "#d8f3dc" : err_rate < 0.25 ? "#fff8e1" : "#fce4ec",
           err_rate < 0.1 ? "#2d6a4f" : err_rate < 0.25 ? "#e65100" : "#c62828")}
    ${pill(s.n_codes, "Codes distincts", "#f1f3f5", "#495057")}
  </div>`;
}
```

## Row

### Resultats {width="65%"}

```{ojs}
//| output: false
error_filter_state = {
  const parts = ["true_level4 IS NOT NULL", "predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL"];

  if (global_exclude_tech) parts.push("NOT is_technical");

  if (err_search_text?.trim())
    parts.push(`LOWER(l_pr_product) LIKE '%${err_search_text.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/'/g,"''")}%'`);

  if (err_true_code?.trim())
    parts.push(`(true_level4 LIKE '${err_true_code.trim().replace(/'/g,"''")}%' OR true_level1 LIKE '${err_true_code.trim().replace(/'/g,"''")}%')`);

  if (err_pred_code?.trim())
    parts.push(`(predicted_level4 LIKE '${err_pred_code.trim().replace(/'/g,"''")}%')`);

  if (err_source !== "Toutes")
    parts.push(`source = '${err_source.replace(/'/g,"''")}'`);

  if (err_year !== "Toutes")
    parts.push(`annee_int = ${err_year}`);

  if (err_shop_type !== "Tous")
    parts.push(`shop_type_name = '${err_shop_type.replace(/'/g,"''")}'`);

  parts.push(`confidence_num >= ${err_conf_min} AND confidence_num <= ${err_conf_max}`);

  switch (err_severity) {
    case "Erreurs seulement":  parts.push("err_l4 = true"); break;
    case "Correct seulement":  parts.push("error_severity = 'correct'"); break;
    case "near-miss":          parts.push("error_severity = 'near-miss'"); break;
    case "L2 faux":            parts.push("error_severity = 'L2 faux'"); break;
    case "L3 faux":            parts.push("error_severity = 'L3 faux'"); break;
    case "far-miss":           parts.push("error_severity = 'far-miss'"); break;
  }

  return { where_clause: parts.join(" AND ") };
}
```

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok")
    return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">Chargez un fichier pour explorer les erreurs.</p>`

  const { where_clause } = error_filter_state;

  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      l_pr_product                        AS produit,
      CAST(code AS VARCHAR)               AS code_vrai,
      CAST(true_level4 AS VARCHAR)        AS vrai_l4,
      CAST(predicted_level4 AS VARCHAR)   AS pred_l4,
      ROUND(confidence_num * 100, 1)      AS conf_pct,
      error_severity                      AS severite,
      COALESCE(source, '')                AS source,
      COALESCE(CAST(annee_int AS VARCHAR), '') AS annee
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${where_clause}
    ORDER BY confidence_num DESC
    LIMIT 500
  `);

  if (rows.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; text-align:center; padding:2rem">Aucun resultat pour ces criteres.</p>`;

  const sevClass = {
    "correct": "sev-correct", "near-miss": "sev-nearmiss",
    "L3 faux": "sev-l3faux", "L2 faux": "sev-l2faux", "far-miss": "sev-farmiss"
  };

  const table_html = html`
    <div style="max-height:480px; overflow-y:auto">
      <table class="dash-table">
        <thead><tr>
          <th style="min-width:180px">Produit</th>
          <th>Code vrai</th>
          <th>Predit L4</th>
          <th style="text-align:right">Conf.</th>
          <th>Severite</th>
          <th>Source</th>
          <th>Annee</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          ${rows.map(r => html`
            <tr class="${sevClass[r.severite] || ''}">
              <td style="max-width:220px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap"
                  title="${r.produit}">${r.produit}</td>
              <td><span class="code-badge">${r.code_vrai}</span></td>
              <td><span class="code-badge" style="background:${r.severite === 'correct' ? '#d8f3dc' : '#fce4ec'};
                  color:${r.severite === 'correct' ? '#2d6a4f' : '#c62828'}">${r.pred_l4}</span></td>
              <td style="text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; font-weight:600">${r.conf_pct}%</td>
              <td><span style="font-size:.78em; padding:.15rem .4rem; border-radius:4px;
                  background:${PALETTE.severity[r.severite] || PALETTE.neutral}22;
                  color:${PALETTE.severity[r.severite] || PALETTE.neutral}">${r.severite ?? '–'}</span></td>
              <td style="font-size:.82em">${r.source}</td>
              <td style="font-size:.82em">${r.annee}</td>
            </tr>`
          )}
        </tbody>
      </table>
      ${rows.length === 500 ? html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; text-align:center; font-size:.8em; padding:.5rem">
        Affichage limite a 500 resultats — affinez les filtres pour voir plus.</p>` : ''}
    </div>`;

  const export_btn = html`<button style="
    border:1px solid #dee2e6; background:white; border-radius:6px;
    padding:.35rem .8rem; font-size:.82em; cursor:pointer; margin-bottom:.5rem;
    color:#495057; transition:all .15s
  ">Exporter CSV (${rows.length} lignes)</button>`;
  export_btn.onmouseenter = () => { export_btn.style.background = "#f8f9fa"; };
  export_btn.onmouseleave = () => { export_btn.style.background = "white"; };
  export_btn.onclick = () => {
    const header = Object.keys(rows[0]).join(",");
    const lines = rows.map(r => Object.values(r).map(v =>
      typeof v === "string" && (v.includes(",") || v.includes('"'))
        ? `"${v.replace(/"/g, '""')}"` : v
    ).join(","));
    const csv = [header, ...lines].join("\n");
    const blob = new Blob(["\uFEFF" + csv], { type: "text/csv;charset=utf-8" });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a"); a.href = url; a.download = "erreurs_coicop.csv"; a.click();
  };

  return html`${export_btn}${table_html}`;
}
```

### Top confusions & severite {width="35%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">…</p>`

  const { where_clause } = error_filter_state;

  const pairs = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      true_level4 || ' -> ' || predicted_level4 AS paire,
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${where_clause} AND err_l4 = true
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 15
  `);

  const confusion_chart = pairs.length === 0
    ? html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; font-size:.85em">Aucune erreur avec ces filtres.</p>`
    : Plot.plot({
        height: 240,
        marginLeft: 170,
        marginBottom: 35,
        style: { fontSize: "11px" },
        x: { label: "Nombre d'erreurs", grid: true },
        marks: [
          Plot.barX(pairs.slice().reverse(), {
            y: "paire",
            x: "n",
            fill: "#d62828",
            fillOpacity: 0.8,
            rx: 3,
            tip: true,
            title: d => `${d.paire}\n${d.n} erreurs`
          }),
          Plot.ruleX([0])
        ]
      });

  const sev_data = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      COALESCE(error_severity, 'N/A') AS severity,
      CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS n
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${where_clause} AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY n DESC
  `);

  const sev_colors = {
    "correct": "#2ec4b6", "near-miss": "#8bc34a",
    "L3 faux": "#f77f00", "L2 faux": "#ff6b35", "far-miss": "#d62828"
  };

  const sev_chart = Plot.plot({
    height: 180,
    marginLeft: 100,
    marginBottom: 35,
    style: { fontSize: "11px" },
    x: { label: "Observations", grid: true },
    color: {
      domain: Object.keys(sev_colors),
      range: Object.values(sev_colors)
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(sev_data, {
        y: "severity",
        x: "n",
        fill: "severity",
        rx: 3,
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.severity} : ${fmt_n(d.n)}`
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });

  return html`
    <div class="section-title">Top confusions (L4)</div>
    ${confusion_chart}
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:1.2rem">Repartition par severite</div>
    ${sev_chart}`;
}
```


# Analyse Modele

## Row {height="70px"}

```{ojs}
html`<div style="
  background:linear-gradient(135deg, #eef0ff 0%, #f8f9fa 100%);
  border:1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius:10px;
  padding:.7rem 1.2rem; font-size:.88em; color:#495057
">
  <strong>Inspection client-side via Pyodide</strong> — Fournissez l'URL HTTPS du repertoire du modele.
  Le fichier <code>*_metadata.pkl</code> sera telecharge et deserialise dans le navigateur, sans serveur.
</div>`
```

## Row {height="50px"}

```{ojs}
viewof model_url = Inputs.text({
  label: "URL du repertoire modele (HTTPS)",
  placeholder: "https://minio.example.com/bucket/models/basic_model",
  value: ""
})

viewof inspect_model_btn = Inputs.button("Inspecter le modele", {
  value: 0,
  reduce: v => v + 1
})
```

```{ojs}
{
  if (!inspect_model_btn) return html`<span></span>`;
  if (!pyodide_instance && inspect_model_btn)
    return html`<span style="color:#f77f00; font-size:.82em">Chargement de Pyodide (~20 Mo, mis en cache)…</span>`;
  if (pyodide_instance)
    return html`<span style="color:#2ec4b6; font-size:.82em">Pyodide pret</span>`;
}
```

## Row

### Metadonnees du modele {width="55%"}

```{ojs}
//| output: false
pyodide_instance = {
  inspect_model_btn;
  if (!inspect_model_btn) return null;
  const { loadPyodide } = await import("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.26.4/full/pyodide.mjs");
  return await loadPyodide();
}

model_metadata = {
  if (!pyodide_instance || !model_url?.trim()) return null;

  const base = model_url.trim().replace(/\/$/, "");
  const candidates = [
    "basic_metadata.pkl",
    "hierarchical_metadata.pkl",
    "multihead_metadata.pkl"
  ];

  try {
    for (const name of candidates) {
      let resp;
      try { resp = await fetch(`${base}/${name}`); } catch { continue; }
      if (!resp.ok) continue;

      const bytes = new Uint8Array(await resp.arrayBuffer());
      pyodide_instance.globals.set("pkl_bytes", pyodide_instance.toPy(bytes));

      const result = pyodide_instance.runPython(`
import pickle, json

data = pickle.loads(bytes(pkl_bytes))
safe = {}
config_keys = []
label_keys = []
other_keys = []

for k, v in data.items():
    if isinstance(v, (str, int, float, bool, type(None))):
        safe[k] = v
        # Heuristic: config params are scalars with short names
        if any(p in k for p in ['lr', 'epoch', 'batch', 'dim', 'ngram', 'seq',
                                  'patience', 'samples', 'teacher', 'bucket',
                                  'embedding', 'level', 'workers', 'memory']):
            config_keys.append(k)
        else:
            other_keys.append(k)
    elif isinstance(v, (list, tuple)):
        safe[f"{k}_count"] = len(v)
        if len(v) <= 50:
            safe[k] = [str(x) for x in v]
        label_keys.append(k)
    elif isinstance(v, dict):
        safe[f"{k}_count"] = len(v)
        safe[f"{k}_keys"] = [str(x) for x in list(v.keys())[:30]]
        # Detect per-level structures
        if all(isinstance(vv, dict) for vv in v.values()):
            for sub_k, sub_v in v.items():
                safe[f"{k}.{sub_k}_count"] = len(sub_v)
                safe[f"{k}.{sub_k}_sample"] = [str(x) for x in list(sub_v.keys())[:15]]
        label_keys.append(k)
    else:
        other_keys.append(k)

safe["_config_keys"] = config_keys
safe["_label_keys"] = label_keys
safe["_other_keys"] = other_keys
safe
      `);

      return {
        metadata_file: name,
        model_type: name.replace("_metadata.pkl", ""),
        model_url: base,
        metadata: result.toJs({ dict_converter: Object.fromEntries })
      };
    }
    return { error: `Aucun fichier *_metadata.pkl trouve a ${base}` };
  } catch(e) {
    return { error: `Erreur Pyodide : ${e.message}` };
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
{
  if (!inspect_model_btn)
    return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">Renseignez l'URL du modele et cliquez sur Inspecter.</p>`;

  if (!model_metadata)
    return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}">Chargement en cours…</p>`;

  if (model_metadata.error)
    return html`<div style="background:#fce4ec; color:#c62828; padding:.8rem 1rem; border-radius:8px; font-size:.88em">${model_metadata.error}</div>`;

  const meta = model_metadata.metadata ?? {};
  const modelType = model_metadata.model_type;

  // Type badge
  const typeBadge = {
    basic: { label: "Classifieur Plat", color: "#4361ee" },
    hierarchical: { label: "Classifieur Hierarchique", color: "#2ec4b6" },
    multihead: { label: "Classifieur Multi-tete", color: "#6c63ff" }
  }[modelType] || { label: modelType, color: PALETTE.neutral };

  // Separate config params from other scalar params
  const configKeys = meta._config_keys ?? [];
  const otherKeys = meta._other_keys ?? [];

  const config_rows = Object.entries(meta).filter(([k]) =>
    configKeys.includes(k) && !k.startsWith("_")
  );
  const other_scalar_rows = Object.entries(meta).filter(([k]) =>
    otherKeys.includes(k) && !k.startsWith("_") && typeof meta[k] !== "object"
  );

  return html`
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.8rem; margin-bottom:1rem">
      <span style="background:${typeBadge.color}; color:white; padding:.3rem .8rem; border-radius:6px; font-weight:700; font-size:.85em">
        ${typeBadge.label}
      </span>
      <code style="font-size:.8em; color:${PALETTE.neutral}">${model_metadata.metadata_file}</code>
    </div>

    <div class="section-title">Configuration du modele</div>
    <table class="dash-table">
      <thead><tr><th>Parametre</th><th>Valeur</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${config_rows.map(([k, v]) => html`
          <tr>
            <td><code style="font-size:.85em">${k}</code></td>
            <td style="font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums">${String(v ?? "–")}</td>
          </tr>`)}
      </tbody>
    </table>

    ${other_scalar_rows.length > 0 ? html`
      <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:1rem">Autres parametres</div>
      <table class="dash-table">
        <thead><tr><th>Cle</th><th>Valeur</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          ${other_scalar_rows.map(([k, v]) => html`
            <tr>
              <td><code style="font-size:.85em">${k}</code></td>
              <td>${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : String(v ?? "–")}</td>
            </tr>`)}
        </tbody>
      </table>` : ''}
  `;
}
```

### Codes COICOP connus {width="45%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (!model_metadata?.metadata) {
    if (inspect_model_btn)
      return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; font-size:.88em">Inspectez un modele pour voir ses codes.</p>`;
    return html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; font-size:.88em">En attente d'une inspection.</p>`;
  }

  const m = model_metadata.metadata;
  const modelType = model_metadata.model_type;

  // For hierarchical/multihead: show per-level class counts
  const levelEntries = Object.entries(m).filter(([k]) =>
    k.match(/^level_label_to_idx\.\w+_count$/) ||
    k.match(/^level_label_names\.\w+_count$/)
  );

  // For basic: show label_names or label2id
  const basicCodes = m.label_names || m.label2id_keys || m.id2label_keys || [];
  const basicCount = m.label_names_count || m.label2id_count || m.id2label_count || null;

  // Per-level samples
  const levelSamples = Object.entries(m).filter(([k]) =>
    k.match(/^level_label_to_idx\.\w+_sample$/) ||
    k.match(/^level_label_names\.\w+_sample$/)
  );

  let content;

  if (modelType !== "basic" && levelEntries.length > 0) {
    // Hierarchical or multihead: show per-level breakdown
    const levels = {};
    for (const [k, v] of levelEntries) {
      const match = k.match(/\.(\w+)_count$/);
      if (match) levels[match[1]] = v;
    }
    const levelSampleMap = {};
    for (const [k, v] of levelSamples) {
      const match = k.match(/\.(\w+)_sample$/);
      if (match) levelSampleMap[match[1]] = v;
    }

    const levelColors = ["#4361ee", "#2ec4b6", "#f77f00", "#d62828", "#6c63ff"];

    content = html`
      <div class="section-title">Classes par niveau</div>
      <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:.5rem; margin-bottom:1rem">
        ${Object.entries(levels).map(([lvl, count], i) => html`
          <div style="
            background:${levelColors[i % levelColors.length]}15;
            border:1px solid ${levelColors[i % levelColors.length]}40;
            border-radius:8px; padding:.5rem .8rem; text-align:center; min-width:80px
          ">
            <div style="font-size:1.3em; font-weight:800; color:${levelColors[i % levelColors.length]}">${count}</div>
            <div style="font-size:.72em; color:#495057; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.04em">${lvl}</div>
          </div>`
        )}
      </div>

      ${Object.entries(levelSampleMap).map(([lvl, codes], i) => html`
        <details style="margin-bottom:.6rem">
          <summary style="cursor:pointer; font-size:.82em; font-weight:600; color:#495057">
            ${lvl} — exemples de codes
          </summary>
          <div style="font-size:.78em; line-height:2; padding:.4rem 0">
            ${codes.map(c => html`<span class="code-badge" style="margin:.15rem">${c}</span>`)}
          </div>
        </details>`
      )}
    `;
  } else if (basicCodes.length > 0 || basicCount) {
    // Basic: flat code list
    content = html`
      <div class="section-title">
        Codes COICOP connus
        ${basicCount ? html`<span style="
          background:#4361ee; color:white; font-size:.75em; padding:.15rem .5rem;
          border-radius:10px; margin-left:.5rem; font-weight:600
        ">${basicCount}</span>` : ""}
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:.8em; max-height:350px; overflow-y:auto; line-height:2">
        ${basicCodes.map(c => html`<span class="code-badge" style="margin:.15rem">${c}</span>`)}
        ${basicCount && basicCount > basicCodes.length
          ? html`<span style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; font-size:.9em"> … et ${basicCount - basicCodes.length} autres</span>`
          : ""}
      </div>
    `;
  } else {
    content = html`<p style="color:${PALETTE.neutral}; font-size:.85em">Aucune information sur les codes trouvee dans les metadonnees.</p>`;
  }

  return content;
}
```
